issue_summary: Add getClasses(package) to ClassPath. IO now happens at the time ClassPath.from(ClassLoader) is called, rather than getClasses(). Created by MOE: http://code.google.com/p/moe-java MOE_MIGRATED_REVID=33383562
javadoc_before:
/** * Returns a {@code ClassPath} representing all classes loadable from {@code classloader} and its * parent class loaders. * *

Currently only {@link URLClassLoader} and only {@code file://} urls are supported. */
javadoc_after:
/** * Returns a {@code ClassPath} representing all classes loadable from {@code classloader} and its * parent class loaders. * *

Currently only {@link URLClassLoader} and only {@code file://} urls are supported. * * @throws IOException if the attempt to read class path resources (jar files or directories) * failed. */
